note: State-Foreign Operations FY 2025 (Reported in Senate) account amounts, extracted from the committee report's 3-line summary blocks and validated against the bill XML. Committee-recommendation amounts are in actual dollars. `match_path` is the mapped bill node when the account name resolves uniquely (strict node-level check); null otherwise, where the test falls back to agency-scoped recall via `title`. External ground truth for GitHub #8. Regenerate with scripts/build_validation.py.
